message:
feat(search): add RerankStep for search pipeline integration

Wire reranker into search pipeline with:
- SearchResult.rerank_score: Option<f32> field for reranking scores
- RerankStep module for second-pass reranking via cross-encoder models
- Configurable top_k and min_candidates thresholds
- Stable sort: rerank_score desc, then original score for ties
- Unit tests for reordering, skip behavior, top-K limiting, and error handling

Closes bd-ylsp.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
